chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 608 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.28 2. For orders on CMA No.2380/2020 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.2381/2020 29.01.2026 Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of applicant which is taken on record. Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
